Class Easy

java.lang.Object
item.base.BasePuzzle
item.level.Easy
public class Easy extends BasePuzzle
The Easy class represents the basic difficulty level of a puzzle in the game. It extends BasePuzzle and implements a predefined time limit and a specific collection of images to be displayed.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final List<String>
    pictureNames
    A list containing the resource file names for the images associated with this puzzle.
    private final int
    timeLimit
    The fixed time duration in seconds allocated for solving an easy puzzle.

  • Field Details

    • pictureNames

      private final List<String> pictureNames
      A list containing the resource file names for the images associated with this puzzle.

    • timeLimit

      private final int timeLimit
      The fixed time duration in seconds allocated for solving an easy puzzle. Default is set to 20 seconds.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • Easy

      public Easy(String answer, List<String> pictureNames)
      Constructs an Easy puzzle instance with a specific answer and a list of pictures.
      Parameters:
      answer - The correct solution string for the puzzle.
      pictureNames - A list of image file names used to visualize the puzzle.

  • Method Details

    • setPictureName

      public void setPictureName(String pictureName)
      Adds a picture name to the list of images for this puzzle.
      Specified by:
      setPictureName in class BasePuzzle
      Parameters:
      pictureName - The file name of the image.

    • getPictureNames

      public List<String> getPictureNames()
      Retrieves the list of image resource paths assigned to this puzzle.
      Specified by:
      getPictureNames in class BasePuzzle
      Returns:
      A List of image file name strings.

    • getTimeLimit

      public int getTimeLimit()
      Retrieves the predefined time limit for this difficulty level.
      Specified by:
      getTimeLimit in class BasePuzzle
      Returns:
      The integer value of the time limit (20 seconds).
